description_long: This is a humanoid figure with a bald head, pointed ears, and a slightly exaggerated facial structure, giving it a somewhat fantastical or otherworldly appearance. The figure is dressed in a textured, short-sleeved collared jacket with a zipper and trim, paired with fitted pants and ankle-high shoes. The skin is smooth and uniform, with visible musculature in the arms and a neutral, relaxed hand posture. The clothing appears to be made from synthetic or woven materials, with a distinct pattern on the jacket and a more subtle texture on the pants. The shoes are sturdy and closed-toe, suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The overall build is average, with a straight posture and arms held slightly away from the body.
description: A bald, pointed-eared humanoid figure in a textured collared jacket, fitted pants, and sturdy shoes, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, pointed ears, collared jacket, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, ear shape, and the fit of the clothing along the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, waistband, and the back of the shoes, with arms slightly extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the way the clothing fits along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared jacket with zipper and trim, fitted pants, ankle-high shoes
